title: Ayush University Exam Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Ayush University Exam Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Pt. Deendayal Upadhyay Memorial Health Sciences and Ayush University of Chhattisgarh Result 2026 Out for BAMS Final Professional, MBBS 1st & 2nd Year and BDS 3rd Year Revaluation exams on the official website - ddumhsaucg.ac.in on 09-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Ayush University result.

content.text: Pt. Deendayal Upadhyay Memorial Health Sciences and Ayush University of Chhattisgarh has officially released the Ayush University Exam Result 2026 for various UG professional examinations on 09 April 2026. The latest update on the university result portal includes the Result of B.A.M.S. Final Professional Examination Jan/Feb-2026, Revised Result of M.B.B.S. First Year Examination Dec-2025 (Roll No. 25012100), Result of Revaluation B.D.S. 3rd Year Examination Oct-2025, and Revised Result of M.B.B.S. Second Year Examination Nov-2025 (Roll No. 24010257).Ayush University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - ddumhsaucg.ac.in.

Students can access their course-wise medical and AYUSH examination results through the dedicated result portal at results.ddumhsaucg.ac.in or via the university result page, where each notification provides a direct PDF result link.The university publishes detailed tabulation and individual roll-number-wise information in PDF format for BAMS, MBBS and BDS examinations, including revised and revaluation results. After downloading the relevant result PDF, students should carefully verify their roll number, course, examination session, subject-wise marks and result status, and contact the examination section of Ayush University in case of any discrepancy or query.

sections.heading: Ayush University Exam Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Ayush University of Chhattisgarh has declared the latest Ayush University Exam Result 2026 for key medical and AYUSH programmes, including BAMS Final Professional Jan/Feb-2026, revised MBBS First and Second Year results for specific roll numbers, and BDS 3rd Year revaluation result for Oct-2025. These results are now available on the official result portal, allowing students to check their updated status and download the official PDF notifications directly from the university website.

rows: Pt. Deendayal Upadhyay Memorial Health Sciences and Ayush University of Chhattisgarh
BAMS Final Professional, MBBS First Year, MBBS Second Year, BDS 3rd Year (Revaluation)
Jan/Feb-2026 (BAMS Final), Dec-2025 (MBBS 1st Year), Nov-2025 (MBBS 2nd Year), Oct-2025 (BDS 3rd Year)

content.text: Ayush University has activated course-wise PDF links for the latest Ayush University Exam Result 2026 on its result portal. Students can use the direct result links given below to open the official PDFs for BAMS Final Professional Jan/Feb-2026, revised MBBS First and Second Year results, and BDS 3rd Year revaluation. All these links are listed under the Ayush University result page, making it easy for candidates to view and download their updated result details.

links.label: Result of B.A.M.S. Final Professional Examination Jan/Feb-2026 (Noti. No. 2072, dt-09.04.2026)
Revised Result of M.B.B.S. First Year Examination Dec-2025 (Roll No. 25012100) (Noti. No. 2071, dt-09.04.2026)
Result of Revaluation B.D.S. 3rd Year Examination Oct-2025 (Noti. No. 2070, dt-09.04.2026)
Revised Result of M.B.B.S. Second Year Examination Nov-2025 (Roll No. 24010257) (Noti. No. 2069, dt-09.04.2026)

sections.heading: How to Download Ayush University Exam Result 2026 Online

items: Visit the official Ayush University result page at ddumhsaucg.ac.in/result_university.php.
On the result page, check the list of latest result notifications for different courses and exam sessions.

Locate the relevant result entry such as: "Result of B.A.M.S. Final Professional Examination Jan/Feb-2026" "Revised Result of M.B.B.S. First Year Examination Dec-2025" "Result of Revaluation B.D.S. 3rd Year Examination Oct-2025" "Revised Result of M.B.B.S. Second Year Examination Nov-2025"
"Result of B.A.M.S. Final Professional Examination Jan/Feb-2026"
"Revised Result of M.B.B.S. First Year Examination Dec-2025"
"Result of Revaluation B.D.S. 3rd Year Examination Oct-2025"
"Revised Result of M.B.B.S. Second Year Examination Nov-2025"
Click on the associated "Click Here" or PDF result link for your course.
The official result PDF will open in a new tab showing roll numbers, marks and result details or specific revised information.
Use the search function (Ctrl+F) in the PDF viewer and enter your roll number to find your result quickly.
Verify your roll number, course, examination session and result status carefully.
Download or print the PDF for future reference and contact the university examination section if you find any discrepancy.
